texto: We know that we are continually subjected to a huge range of sensory inputs and internal experiences of sensations and thoughts. In fact, almost anything existing in our universe, that can come into human and other animals' purview, can be experienced as information - a bird call, our friend's 'hello,' the rock we trip over, the intuition we have about the honesty of someone we are talking to, a book we read.
explicacao: Citação de Marcia J. Bates sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We know that we are continually subjected to a huge range of sensory inputs and internal experien…” articula reflexao, connections, information em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e information.
